DP.526.0000:
Buck: Yo, if it isn’t [0103,0000]!\f
Don’t tell me you’re going to Stark
Mountain, too?\f
You’re pretty wimpy...
You’re sure you’re going to be OK?\f
Heh, why am I asking you that?
It’s not like I care.\f
Anyways, if we see each other on
Stark Mountain, the race is on to\r
see who gets the Magma Stone first!\f
DP.526.0001:
Hey, traveling Trainer.
Is your Bag full of items?\r
Or is it full of dreams?
DP.526.0002:
Trainers who lose at the Battle
Tower come here to train.
DP.526.0003:
I’ve been exploring a long time,
but I know when I’m beaten.\f
It takes a better Trainer than me
to explore the volcano thoroughly!
DP.526.0004:
I’m a Cameraman, obviously.\f
Have you seen that TV program,
“Search for the Red GYARADOS!”?\f
You know, “The mysterious
appearance of a raging Pokémon in\r
a lake”?\f
Yeah, that outstanding documentary!
I filmed that!
DP.526.0005:
Oh man! Oh geez! Oh, this is bad!
But I’m a Cameraman, obviously!\f
I have to stand firm and get this
on film for the world to see!
DP.526.0006:
I’m a Cameraman, obviously.\f
“The Eruption of Stark Mountain?
The mystery of the fiery Pokémon\r
asleep deep in the volcano!”\f
I’ve had that documentary all mapped
out in my head for a long time...\f
But I have nothing on film as of yet.
So much for that show.\f
Oh, well. The world’s a huge place.
There’re plenty of other mysteries!
